# Save 10%* on kitchens, eligible appliances & counters

**From:** IKEA Family <ikea@news.email.ikea.us>
**Date:** Thu, 09 Apr 2026 12:54:44 -0600

  Dream kitchens are on sale at the IKEA Dream Kitchen Event


https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 

https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 

IKEA Family members enjoy 10%* off on $3,000+
SEKTION kitchens, eligible appliances, and countertops – plus collect
IKEA Family points for exclusive deals, delivery perks, and treats. 

https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 
 Shop now  
https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D

now

https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 

 Your dream kitchen, delivered and installed with ease 

 From your front door to a full assembly, IKEA’s delivery
and installation services make getting your new kitchen simple. Our expert
team handles the heavy lifting so you can focus on enjoying your dream
kitchen. That’s what we call a win-win. 

https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 
 Learn more  
https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NDF9ADIAAAAAAAA_n9gWJI6VPDffkEVz9FAnO8frdl_XeDI5UWN5nLsYBX557LRsxWlKFzZ701PeBwP4T259jj4NNjomw2IjrnIr2edfffHDBJ2nCgBtZNI 

Learn more  




 
https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 

https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 

 The secret to a dreamy kitchen? LOCKEBO custom countertops.


 From cooking up impressive dinners to spilling coffee,
LOCKEBO custom countertops handle it all. Durable, beautiful, and ready for
every moment in your kitchen, they make your space truly complete. Shop now at
the IKEA Dream Kitchen Event. 

https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NDF9ADIAAAAAAAA_n9gXrIilqyNi5ahbkflLRol7_qLiJzaV5vJui2zNe7WJ5JiLASoNd55r1mbdS0m0fHjptPWYpm3hiLthJAfz91O6wnOXlXQT3RSD6Rw 
 Shop kitchen countertops  
https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NDF9ADIAAAAAAAA_n9gY4KrCI4BKHgUY_d0yMQtNzQ4D2r74O_goGZ65lBjMA8CDR9W9oJ8cucEPf-pXI2OGUZhjdJX-xway1AWjsDuV3_6gHQHPKJpOQgU 

Shop kitchen countertops  


 












 
https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 

https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 

 Less guessing. More planning. Meet with a kitchen expert in
store. 

 Bring your ideas, measurements, and questions. Our
in-store kitchen planners are ready to help you design a kitchen that fits
your space, style, and budget — with guidance every step of the way from
measuring to installation. 

https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 
 Book your appointment  
https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 

Book your appointment  
















 
https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 

https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 

 IKEA Projekt Credit Card 

 The IKEA Projekt Credit Card can help jump start your big
home upgrade with 0% interest for 24 months on purchases of $2,500 or more,
after that, purchase APR is 21.99%.** 

https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 
 Learn more  
https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 

Learn more  


 
https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 

https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 

 Upgrade your kitchen, one appliance at a time 

 Make your kitchen truly yours! Discover SUPERKALL
fridges, smart ovens, and a full range of integrated IKEA appliances designed
to simplify cooking and storage — all ready to complete your dream kitchen.


https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NDF9ADIAAAAAAAA_n9gZdFhXc5Tjkhgo8hUekhPIGv_YbMahE1LwjzX8eVOPKijlsUnhIuF-UHEYFxtkzaLREWIcJt-_eRKCX1y9bRPz67HiVKfVAe2EauM

 Guaranteed to meet life’s demands  


Our SEKTION kitchen system has been rigorously tested and is backed by a
25-year limited warranty.

more   



 
















































  Timeless kitchens, made to last 

From family dinners to quiet mornings, IKEA kitchens
create spaces that feel warm, familiar, and functional. It’s where traditional
design meets smart solutions built for everyday life.

https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D

https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 

 20% off select drinkware 

 Raise a glass to warmer weather with 20% off select
drinkware.3 Perfect for customer celebrations, backyard brunches
and late-night lounging under the stars. 

https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 
 Shop now  
https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 

Shop now  


 

























 
https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 

https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D 

 We’ll double your Earth Month donations 

 In difficult moments, small acts of generosity can make a
big difference. Now through 4/30/26, we will match customer donations up to
$50,000 to support American Red Cross Disaster Relief.5 Every
dollar helps bring comfort and care to families in our communities. You can
donate when you check-out at your local IKEA today.

	- $1 could
provide a hot beverage
	- $3 could provide a comfort kit with hygiene
items
	- $5 could provide a warm blanket

https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D

 IKEA Brooklyn Dock Sale 

Shop IKEA Brooklyn’s Dock Sale! Save up to 75% on furniture and décor. First weekend of every month—Level 1, self-serve warehouse. 

https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?

 *U.S. only. Valid in-store and online. Must provide or
sign-in with IKEA Family member or IKEA Business Network account in order to
receive offer. Not valid on previous purchases. Minimum purchase amount must
be met in a single transaction before taxes. Includes SEKTION and ENHET
cabinets, doors, interiors and finish pieces (cover panels, toekicks &
deco moulding), pre-cut and custom countertops, appliances, kitchen sinks
& faucets, knobs & handles, kitchen integrated lighting, and small
furniture. Excludes KNOXHULT kitchens accessories and TILLREDA appliances.
Offer will apply automatically at check-out if purchase qualifies. Offer
excludes all service fees on applicable Click & Collect, Kitchen Planning
and other IKEA services. Offer cannot be combined with other IKEA offers or
coupons. Discount applied proportionally across eligible items purchased, as
shown on receipt. On returns, only the net purchase price as shown on receipt
is refunded. Other restrictions may apply. See store or IKEA.us/ for more
details.

**Waived Interest, Payment Required plan: Interest will be
charged to your Account from the end of the promotional period on any
remaining promotional plan balance. Minimum payments are required for each
Credit Plan. Minimum payments are NOT guaranteed to pay the
promotional plan balance within the promotional period. Valid for
single transaction only. If the single transaction has multiple shipments,
each shipment may result in a separate Credit Plan, subject to a separate
minimum purchase requirement. Qualifying purchases will automatically be
placed on a promotional plan. If purchase qualifies for more than one plan, it
will be placed on the qualified plan with the longest promotional period. As
of 03/2026, terms for new Accounts: Purchase APR of 21.99%. Minimum interest
charge is $3 in any billing period in which interest is due. Existing
Cardholders: see your credit card agreement for Account terms.

Credit
card offers are subject to credit approval. IKEA Projekt Credit Card Accounts
are issued by Comenity Capital Bank.

This email may be considered an
advertising or promotional message. If you no longer wish to receive these
emails, unsubscribe using the link below.

3U.S. only while
supplies last. Selection may vary by store and online. Must sign-in with IKEA
Family or IKEA Business Network account at checkout to receive offer. Price as
marked. Discount applied pre-tax at register. Not valid on previous purchases
for IKEA Business Network members. Outdoor offer includes outdoor cushions and
cushion covers. Limited to outdoor lounge furniture category only. Accessories
sold separately. Products require assembly. Glassware offer includes all
drinking glasses & glassware sets, wine & champagne glasses, and bar
& cocktail glasses categories only, and most drinking accessories.
Excludes corkscrews and pitchers & carafes category. Other restrictions
may apply. See store or IKEA.us for details.

5Between April
1 and April 30, 2026, IKEA will donate $1 to the American Red Cross for every
$1 donated by customers to the American Red Cross at checkout at participating
IKEA, up to a maximum total donation of $50,000. Any IKEA match is not tax
deductible by customer. Find out more about American Red Cross, an
organization that helps to prevent and alleviate human suffering in the face
of emergencies by mobilizing the power of volunteers and the generosity of
donors, by visiting https://click.news.email.ikea.us/?%3D%3D The American Red Cross name,
logo and copyrighted materials are used with its permission, which in no way
constitutes an endorsement, express or implied, of any product, service,
company, opinion or political position. The American Red Cross name and logo
are registered trademarks owned by the American National Red Cross.

 ©
Inter IKEA Systems B.V. 2026.
